name: 求生匕首（★） | 外表生锈
nameZh: 求生匕首（★） | 外表生锈
descriptionEn: This multi-purpose tactical knife features a serrated edge for ripping through coarse material like bone or fiber, plus a sharp gutting hook. The composite material handle is bolted to the blade with hex nuts. This memento from Siege is still perfectly operational although the exterior surfaces have rusted. Scars build character
descriptionZh: 这把多功能战术匕首，采用骨头或纤维等粗糙材料打造成锯齿刀刃及一个锋利的穿肠钩。复合材料握把上还拴了带有六角螺母的刀片。 这把来自围攻之势的纪念武器可以用一句话来形容：“败絮其外，金玉其中”。 疤痕塑造品格
